<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Alibaba Strategic Partnership — Linda Ma</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&family=DM+Mono:wght@300;400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
--bg:#090909;
--surface:#111111;
--border:#1e1e1e;
--amber:#C8922A;
--white:#F2F2F7;
--mono:DM Mono,monospace;
--sans:DM Sans,sans-serif;
--serif:Cormorant Garamond,Georgia,serif;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:300;overflow-x:hidden}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:1.5rem 120px;background:rgba(9,9,9,0.95);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px)}
.nav-logo{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:0.18em;color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--amber)}
.back-btn{display:inline-block;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:0.65rem 1.25rem;text-decoration:none;transition:border-color 0.2s,color 0.2s;border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:3rem}
.back-btn:hover{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber)}

/* HERO */
.hero{padding:6.5rem 120px 2rem;border-bottom:none}
.hero-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(2.4rem,4.8vw,4.5rem);font-weight:300;line-height:0.95;letter-spacing:-0.02em;color:var(--white);max-width:800px;margin-bottom:3rem}
.hero-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--amber)}

/* IMPACT STRIP */
.impact{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);background:var(--surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.impact-stat{background:var(--surface);padding:120px 3rem}
.impact-stat:first-child{padding-left:120px}
.impact-num{font-family:var(--sans);font-size:clamp(3rem,5vw,5rem);font-weight:300;color:var(--white);line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.5rem}
.impact-num em{color:var(--amber);font-style:normal}
.impact-label{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:var(--white);text-transform:uppercase;opacity:0.5;line-height:1.6;display:-webkit-box;-webkit-line-clamp:2;-webkit-box-orient:vertical;overflow:hidden}

/* SECTIONS */
.section{padding:5rem 120px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.section-eyebrow{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--amber);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5rem}
.section-body{font-size:14px;color:var(--white);line-height:1.85;font-weight:300;opacity:0.8}
.section-body p+p{margin-top:1.25rem}

/* VISUAL BLOCKS */
.visual-block{padding:0 8rem 120px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.visual-wrap{width:100%;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:400px}
.visual-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;display:block}
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1.5rem}
.gallery-item{border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border)}
.gallery-item img{width:100%;height:auto;display:block}
.visual-placeholder{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.16em;color:rgba(242,242,247,0.15);text-transform:uppercase;padding:6rem 0}
.visual-caption{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.12em;color:var(--white);opacity:0.4;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:1.25rem}

/* COLLAB */
.collab{padding:5rem 120px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.collab-title{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--amber);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2rem}
.collab-list{display:flex;flex-wrap:nowrap;background:var(--surface)}
.collab-item{background:var(--surface);padding:1rem 2.5rem;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:0.1em;color:var(--white)}

/* NEXT */
.next{padding:6rem 120px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
.next-label{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--amber);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem}
.next-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:clamp(1.5rem,2.5vw,2.5rem);font-weight:300;color:var(--white)}

.footer{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:2rem 120px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.footer-copy{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:var(--white);opacity:0.4;text-transform:uppercase}
.footer-links{display:flex;gap:2rem}
.footer-links a{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.14em;color:var(--white);opacity:0.4;text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase;transition:opacity 0.2s}
.footer-links a:hover{opacity:1}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
<a href="linda_ma_portfolio.html" class="nav-logo">Linda Ma</a>
<ul class="nav-links">
<li><a href="linda_ma_portfolio.html#work">Work</a></li>
<li><a href="linda_ma_portfolio.html#about">About</a></li>
<li><a href="linda_ma_portfolio.html#contact">Contact</a></li>
</ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
<div style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:0.22em;color:var(--amber);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem">Case Study</div>
<h1 class="hero-title">Alibaba Strategic <em>Partnership</em></h1>
</section>

<!-- PROBLEM + WHAT I DID: 2 columns -->
<section class="section">
<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start">
<div>
<div class="section-eyebrow">The Opportunity</div>
<div class="section-body" style="margin-top:1rem">
<p>[ Placeholder — what user/business problem did the Alibaba partnership solve? Who were the users (SMBs, sellers), and what was broken or missing before? ]</p>
</div>
</div>
<div>
<div class="section-eyebrow">What I Did</div>
<div class="section-body" style="margin-top:1rem">
<p>[ Placeholder — your role, the team, the approach, and what made it land. ]</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- VISUAL GALLERY -->
<div class="visual-block">
<div class="gallery-grid">
